_notes.file: Human settlement generation tables: where sites are, what they do, who controls them, what is wrong, and what scenes they offer.
_notes.editing: Entries should be concrete enough to create playable pressure. Keep labels stable when referenced by compatibility maps, tag hooks, or tests.

sections.siteCategories: Canonical settlement site categories used by validation and compatibility maps.
sections.locations: Specific location labels grouped by placement pool; each label declares its site category.
sections.functionPools: Settlement functions grouped by physical or narrative context.
sections.guFractureFunctionsBySiteCategory: Function overrides favored when GU intensity is dangerous or fractured.
sections.builtForms: Habitat/building forms constrained by site category, exact location, mobility, and mining use.
sections.authorities: Political, corporate, military, civic, or illicit powers that can run a site.
sections.authorityByScale: Authority overrides for automated or abandoned places.
sections.conditions: Current visible operating state of a settlement.
sections.conditionByScale: Condition overrides for automated or abandoned places.
sections.tags: Two-tag prompt pool; each tag carries a pressure phrase for hook synthesis.
sections.tagPairHooks: Specific connective tissue for known tag combinations.
sections.crises: Open crisis pool for inhabited sites.
sections.hiddenTruths: Secret or buried truth pool for inhabited sites.
sections.encounterSitesByFunctionKeyword: Function-keyword rules that add specialized encounter sites.

AI controls security

AI gives contradictory but valid advice
AI has a hidden emergency protocol
AI is being illegally expanded
AI has split into rival task-fragments
AI is compromised by chiral contamination
AI hallucinates during metric storms

AI is being interrogated by investigators
AI wants evacuation but cannot say why
AI is the only witness to a disaster
AI is protecting illegal residents
AI is running the settlement better than humans admit

AI may trigger Gardener attention if pushed

AI is missing

Hidden reason it cannot be abandoned

Abandoned: Hidden reason it cannot be abandoned

tags.label: Abandoned First Wave
tags.pressure: old first-wave decisions still decide who has shelter, air, and legal standing.

tags.label: Air Is Money
tags.pressure: life support has become the settlement currency and the main lever of control.

tags.label: AI Whisper Cult
tags.pressure: residents read spiritual or political meaning into narrow-AI behavior.

tags.label: Anti-Corporate Commune
tags.pressure: the public story hides a working political break with corporate control.

tags.label: Aristocratic Dome
tags.pressure: elite protection and outside deprivation are tied together.

tags.label: Automated but Haunted
tags.pressure: old automation keeps producing patterns locals treat as messages.

tags.label: Bleed-Chaser Port
tags.pressure: travel, debt, and risk all orbit the next moving bleed opportunity.

tags.label: Border Fort
tags.pressure: military necessity is being used to justify civilian restrictions.

tags.label: Broken Terraformer
tags.pressure: a failed environmental project is still shaping the crisis.

tags.label: Chiral Monopoly
tags.pressure: one faction controls access to the resource everyone needs.

tags.label: Debt Labor
tags.pressure: contracts and life-support fees make departure functionally impossible.

tags.label: Deep Ice
tags.pressure: buried volatiles or under-ice habitats conceal the real value of the site.

tags.label: Derelict Yard
tags.pressure: salvage law and old wreckage hide the deeper conflict.

tags.label: Elegant Core Enclave
tags.pressure: polished public spaces mask a harsher dependent economy.

tags.label: Exile Haven
tags.pressure: people with incompatible pasts are forced to rely on each other.

tags.label: Flare Refuge
tags.pressure: survival protocols double as social control.

tags.label: Free Captain Nest
tags.pressure: independent crews set the local law when formal authority fails.

tags.label: Gate Shadow
tags.pressure: route access determines who prospers and who is trapped.

tags.label: Ghost City, Human
tags.pressure: the haunting is human history, not the supernatural.

tags.label: High-G Research
tags.pressure: dangerous science is being treated as necessary infrastructure.

tags.label: Hidden Navy
tags.pressure: military presence is deeper than the public registry admits.

tags.label: Hydrocarbon Frontier
tags.pressure: volatile extraction keeps everyone solvent and vulnerable.

tags.label: Kessler Cloud
tags.pressure: debris hazards make movement, rescue, and evacuation political.

tags.label: Machine-Run Town
tags.pressure: humans depend on systems they do not fully control.

tags.label: Memory-Loss Zone
tags.pressure: missing records and altered recollections decide the dispute.

tags.label: Migrant Swarm
tags.pressure: temporary populations outnumber the institutions meant to govern them.

tags.label: Moving Node Rush
tags.pressure: short-lived opportunity is pushing people into unsafe choices.

tags.label: Narrow-AI Schism
tags.pressure: AIs agree on facts but not on which human orders can be obeyed.

tags.label: Old War Minefield
tags.pressure: legacy weapons make ordinary operations into negotiations.

tags.label: Outlaw Court
tags.pressure: local justice answers to power before law.

tags.label: Penal Extraction
tags.pressure: punishment and resource production are the same system.

tags.label: Perfect Dome, Rotten Outside
tags.pressure: comfort inside depends on sacrifice outside.

tags.label: Plague/Biosafety Fear
tags.pressure: containment policy is shaping every personal choice.

tags.label: Precious Water
tags.pressure: water ownership is the settlement constitution.

tags.label: Religious Geometry
tags.pressure: belief and GU observation are tangled in local politics.

tags.label: Strikebreaker City
tags.pressure: labor peace is being maintained by coercion.

tags.label: Archive War
tags.pressure: whoever controls the records controls legal truth, casualty counts, and property claims.

tags.label: Broken Mirror Swarm
tags.pressure: failed terraforming hardware still decides climate, power, and blame.

tags.label: False Evacuation List
tags.pressure: survival priority was assigned by a list nobody trusts.

tags.label: Gardener Compliance Zone
tags.pressure: opaque Sol/Gardener rules can override local law without explanation.

tags.label: Life-Support Union
tags.pressure: repair crews can save or freeze the whole settlement by choosing where work stops.

tags.label: Medical Triage State
tags.pressure: clinic decisions have become law because exposure and scarcity decide who gets treated.

tags.label: Route Weather Board
tags.pressure: safe windows are forecasts, markets, and political weapons at the same time.

tags.label: Spare Parts Monarchy
tags.pressure: control of replacement parts has hardened into hereditary or cartel power.

tags.label: Storm Shelter Politics
tags.pressure: the shelter plan reveals whose lives the settlement values first.

tags.label: Terraforming Liability
tags.pressure: old climate promises have become debts, lawsuits, and bodies.

tags.label: Exposure Records Sealed
tags.pressure: medical truth is being hidden to protect authority or prevent panic.

tags.label: Interdiction Profiteers
tags.pressure: some locals profit whenever Sol/Gardener fear closes routes.

tags.label: AI Witness Custody
tags.pressure: a narrow AI can prove what happened, so every faction wants lawful control of it.

tags.label: Shelter Lottery
tags.pressure: storm shelter access is allocated by a lottery everyone suspects is rigged.

tags.label: Route Tithe
tags.pressure: every safe transit window is taxed before anyone knows whether it will hold.

tags.label: Clinic Black Market
tags.pressure: treatment, exposure data, and medical chirality stock all move off-book.

tagPairHooks.Air Is Money + Debt Labor: Air Is Money is visible in every meter and airlock; Debt Labor means workers cannot afford passage out.
tagPairHooks.Bleed-Chaser Port + Narrow-AI Schism: Bleed-Chaser Port draws ships racing moving nodes; Narrow-AI Schism means local AIs disagree over which predictions are safe.
tagPairHooks.Perfect Dome, Rotten Outside + Chiral Mo: Perfect Dome, Rotten Outside is the public shape; Chiral Monopoly is the toxic extraction chain everyone outside the dome must endure.
tagPairHooks.Flare Refuge + Storm Shelter Politics: Flare Refuge makes shelter discipline normal; Storm Shelter Politics decides whose names vanish when capacity runs out.
tagPairHooks.Broken Terraformer + Terraforming Liabil: Broken Terraformer is the visible wreck; Terraforming Liability is the reason nobody can admit the project failed.
tagPairHooks.Gate Shadow + Route Weather Board: Gate Shadow controls access; Route Weather Board controls the forecast everyone must pretend is neutral.
tagPairHooks.Memory-Loss Zone + Archive War: Memory-Loss Zone breaks testimony; Archive War makes surviving records more valuable than witnesses.
tagPairHooks.AI Whisper Cult + AI Witness Custody: AI Whisper Cult turns machine behavior into meaning; AI Witness Custody turns that same machine into evidence.
tagPairHooks.Medical Triage State + Exposure Records: Medical Triage State rules the public crisis; Exposure Records Sealed explains why trust is collapsing.
tagPairHooks.Gardener Compliance Zone + Interdiction: Gardener Compliance Zone gives fear legal teeth; Interdiction Profiteers make sure the fear keeps paying.
tagPairHooks.Spare Parts Monarchy + Life-Support Unio: Spare Parts Monarchy owns the inventory; Life-Support Union knows which failing system matters first.
tagPairHooks.False Evacuation List + Migrant Swarm: False Evacuation List is the betrayal; Migrant Swarm is everyone still alive enough to contest it.
tagPairHooks.Route Tithe + Bleed-Chaser Port: Route Tithe taxes each safe window; Bleed-Chaser Port keeps desperate crews coming anyway.
tagPairHooks.Clinic Black Market + Plague/Biosafety F: Clinic Black Market supplies what law withholds; Plague/Biosafety Fear makes every dose a political act.
tagPairHooks.Archive War + Outlaw Court: Archive War decides what counts as true; Outlaw Court decides who pays before truth arrives.

crises: Sabotage of the refinery, gate, or AI systems

Radiator field sabotage is heating the settlement

Imported volatile tanks are legally frozen
Sol/Gardener compliance team seizes the port
Interdiction warning contradicts the published route plan
Archive court releases two incompatible rulings
AI witness testimony becomes publicly accessible
Maintenance logs prove the disaster was forecast
Evacuation ark launches without most of its manifest
